title: I would like for the connect boards column to transfer the information from board to board via automation.
excerpt:
Yea, I’m pretty furious about what happened recently. I would like for the connect boards column to transfer the information from board to board via automation. 
Actually, this idea was recommended by a Monday.com’s rep …

posts.author: pedro.diaz (Pedro Diaz Jr.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yea, I’m pretty furious about what happened recently. I would like for the connect boards column to transfer the information from board to board via automation.

Actually, this idea was recommended by a Monday.com’s rep around 6-8 months ago. It’s been working great until about a week ago. What was changed within Monday.com in 2025 that caused this to stop working? Our company has re-designed its work flow to incorporate this recommendation by Monday.com, spending countless hours, with 15+ boards using this concept, and now I’m being told by another rep and tech that it doesn’t work and that Monday.com doesn’t support it. The reason as to why Monday.com’s reps would suggest this idea that will ultimately fail down the line is beyond me. We are losing information by the hour, workload is piling, and I feel like I am between the sword and the wall.

Now I’ve received “another” suggestion that will force me to change everything that I’ve built for our company. Simply unacceptable.

Monday.com, please make this work again.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @pedro.diaz

We’ve developed an app called Connected Boards Automations. Which allows to run robust automations on connected boards column, and also supports subitems. Here are two examples of how it can be used in this case →

As long as the subitem and item are connected via connected boards. You can

Sync values →

Screenshot 2025-02-05 at 13.04.252208×562 39.9 KB

Copy values →

Screenshot 2025-02-05 at 13.05.262240×600 36.8 KB

You can find it in the monday.com app marketplace in the platform or here - https://monday.com/marketplace/listing/10000321/connected-boards-automations-

Hope that helps!
